title: Anti Item Break
description: Prevents accidental item destruction by disabling the item once it reaches 1 durability.
body:
![Anti Item Break Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f93c241dc4a51c1db8ef39fbee55fb8f51224b45.png) --- [](https://discord.gg/tqn38v6w7k) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) This fabric mod prevents accidental item destruction by disabling the item once it reaches 1 durability.
--- ### Low Durability Example ![Broken Item example](https://i.ibb.co/PzQCd5Cg/2025-09-30-14-33-39.png) When the tool reaches a certain durability the tool completely stops working. An action bar is shown, and you can hold down a bypass button in order to continue using the tool (it will break). --- ### Configuration Screen ![Configuration Screen](https://i.ibb.co/1fYSKbPj/2025-09-30-14-36-25.png) The configuration screen allows you to enable the mod per item, with the choices: always enabled, only if the item is enchanted, or completely off. By standard, everything is set to on. --- The mod also supports most items added by other mods!
